# Arkaik

> Product graph browser for product architects

## What is Arkaik

Arkaik is a visual product graph browser that lets product architects map their entire product as an interactive graph. It uses a 4-species model (flows, views, data models, API endpoints) with playlist-driven composition to model user journeys, screens, data entities, and API integrations.

## Key Concepts

- **Flow**: An ordered sequence of views and sub-flows representing a user journey
- **View**: A reusable page or screen in the product
- **Data Model**: A data entity or table used by the product
- **API Endpoint**: An API endpoint consumed or exposed by the product
- **Playlist**: The ordered list of entries (views, sub-flows, conditions, junctions) inside a flow
- **Edge**: A relationship between nodes — composes (hierarchy), calls (view→API), displays (view→data), queries (API→data)

## Documentation

- [Architecture](https://arkaik.app/docs/architecture): System design, component relationships, data flow
- [Graph Model](https://arkaik.app/docs/graph-model): 4-species taxonomy, composition model, statuses, platforms, edge types
- [Data Layer](https://arkaik.app/docs/data-layer): DataProvider interface, local storage, import/export format
- [Conventions](https://arkaik.app/docs/conventions): Coding patterns, file organization, state management
- [Vision](https://arkaik.app/docs/vision): Product direction and roadmap

## Import/Export Format

Arkaik projects are importable/exportable as JSON files conforming to the ProjectBundle schema.

- JSON Schema: https://arkaik.app/schema/project-bundle.json
- Example bundle: https://arkaik.app/schema/example-bundle.json
- Full documentation + schema: https://arkaik.app/llms-full.txt

## Links

- Website: https://arkaik.app
- Projects: https://arkaik.app/projects
- Documentation: https://arkaik.app/docs
- Generate with AI: https://arkaik.app/generate
